original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求展示产品细节
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Professional Amazon product photography, macro close-up shot focusing on exquisite craftsmanship. 
[Subject Lock]: A luxurious three-piece bridal jewelry set (tiara, V-drop necklace, earrings) in Baroque style. Center stage features large, pear-cut teardrop clear crystals surrounded by dense pavé and prong-set round brilliant-cut crystals. The metal is polished Rhodium plating with a high-gloss silver finish. 
Lighting: High-key studio lighting with softboxes to create distinct specular highlights on the crystal facets, enhancing the sparkle without blowing out details. 
Background: Pure white (#FFFFFF) infinite background with a subtle, natural contact shadow to ground the items. 
Quality: 8K resolution, ultra-sharp focus, commercial grade.

[Text & UI Layout]
Text Content (English Only for Amazon): 
Main Title: "ROYAL ELEGANCE"
Sub Title: "Premium Zirconia & Silver Plating"
Font Style: Minimalist, thin sans-serif font, dark grey color. 
Position: Text placed discreetly in the bottom right corner or floating in negative space, ensuring the jewelry remains the absolute focal point.
layout_logic:
1. 亚马逊主图规范（Listing Main Image）通常严禁出现文字和非纯白背景。因此，如果此图用于搜索结果第一张图，请在生成后移除所有文字层，仅保留纯白底和产品。 
2. 提示词中的文字配置更适合用于Listing的第2-3张细节展示图（Feature Image）或A+页面。 
3. 构图上，建议将皇冠置于上方，项链呈V字形自然下垂环绕，耳环置于中间或两侧，形成对称、平衡的视觉结构。
